name: Motivation Table
description: Five Parsecs From Home character motivation table (Core Rules p.26) — VERIFIED against core_rulebook.txt 2026-03-22

1-8.name: Wealth
1-8.description: Driven by the pursuit of riches and financial security.

9-14.name: Fame
9-14.description: Wants to be known across the galaxy.

15-19.name: Glory
15-19.description: Seeks battlefield glory and martial honor.

20-26.name: Survival
20-26.description: Just wants to stay alive in a dangerous galaxy.

27-32.name: Escape
27-32.description: Running from something — a past, a debt, or a threat.

33-39.name: Adventure
33-39.description: Thrives on excitement and new experiences.

40-44.name: Truth
40-44.description: Seeking answers to deep questions or hidden knowledge.

45-49.name: Technology
45-49.description: Fascinated by tech and always tinkering.

50-56.name: Discovery
50-56.description: Compelled to explore and find new things.

57-63.name: Loyalty
57-63.description: Devoted to crew, cause, or code above all else.

64-69.name: Revenge
64-69.description: Settling old scores drives every decision.

70-74.name: Romance
70-74.description: Following the heart wherever it leads.

75-79.name: Faith
75-79.description: Driven by deep spiritual or philosophical conviction.

80-84.name: Political
80-84.description: Seeking influence and control over systems and people.

85-90.name: Power
85-90.description: Seeks authority and dominance through force of will.

91-95.name: Order
91-95.description: Believes the galaxy needs structure and discipline.

96-100.name: Freedom
96-100.description: Will fight any system that tries to control them.
